claims.statement: Great Wall of China length is larger than Seikan Tunnel length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Great Wall of China length: 21196 km. Seikan Tunnel length: 53.85 km.

claims.statement: Elite sprinter top speed (approx.) is slower than Cheetah sprint.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Elite sprinter top speed (approx.): 45 km/h. Cheetah sprint: 120 km/h.

claims.statement: Panama Canal length is at least 2× longer than Appalachian Trail length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Panama Canal length: 82 km. Appalachian Trail length: 3500 km.

claims.statement: There are fewer bits in a byte than UN member states.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 8 bits vs 193 states.

claims.statement: Barcode first scanned happened before Penicillin discovered.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. Barcode first scanned: 1974. Penicillin discovered: 1928.
